title: Prevent HTTP request redirections from forging attacks
description: Open redirection occurs when an application uses user-controllable data to redirect users to a URL. An attacker could manipulate a user to browse into a specially crafted URL, such as https://trusted.example.com?url=evil.example.com, to redirect the victim to his evil domain.
recommendation: Avoid using user-controllable data for HTTP redirections.
impact: Allows attackers to trick users into visiting malicious domains.

checks.message: Avoid using user-controllable data for HTTP redirections.
